questions.question: Should the next move coarsen pressure pattern signatures, or is one-event-per-pattern meaningful signal?
Should pressure be grouped by parent pressure class, subtype, move_kind, halt_reason, or another reviewed signature level?
Is the 7/6/6/4 parent-pressure surface enough to open a proposal lane, or does fragmentation block proposal?

reason: Pressure is conserved but every pressure event has a unique pattern signature; there is no repeated dominant pressure pattern.
